title: Vegapunk’s Future Island
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kizaru, Unknown person #2, Kid, Unknown person #3, Vegapunk as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What Happened to your head?!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Wasn't it larger like a lightbulb?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah... because it had grown quite large...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I cut it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't cut it just like cutting a hair!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well.. When we met last time,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: *original head

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My body size grew large just like the giants.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've heard rumors that he's a large guy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yea, like a balloon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No. The truth is.. Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi Nomi N

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No. The truth is I am a "Brainiac Man" who ate the Nomi Nomi grui fruit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With it, I can remember every tiny detail of knowledge!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The brain is getting bigger and bigger with the data capacity!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, I was born as a genius with unlimited databank in my brain!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It has grown into the world's largest brain and continues to grow!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Even now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I don't see any change at all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That was incredible!! As a researcher, are you strong too, Dr vegapunk?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Of course!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: wow --

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Old man, you cut your head.. Does that mean, you became an idiot?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't under- estimate my genius, you damn brat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This Apple is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...An antenna!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look at the top of the island!! On the backside of that giant egg

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is "Punk Records" written on it! That is a Hangar for my brain!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if I am apart from it, this antenna will connect data via psychic waves. So there's no problem!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Eh!? Isn't that too large?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Earlier, you guys met with a girl named

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Vegapunk, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That was my clone. There are 6 of them on this island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is that a Ninja move!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Each one is an expert in a certain field.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All 6 of them share the same personality as me, but the labor force is that of 6 people!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What's that supposed to mean!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It means that once a day, I synchronize their experiences and knowledge through punk records.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their personality and duties are separate, but each of their experiences is worthwhile!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it because they share the same brain with you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What an Incomprehensible world.

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
